title: KLA Corp.: Rising Above Cyclicality

title: KLA Corporation: A Top Pick In The Semiconductor Industry
text: KLA Corporation is a leading semiconductor equipment manufacturer with a dominant market share of over 50% in the semiconductor process control market. The company's growth prospects are promising, driven by the increasing importance of its products in the evolving semiconductor landscape. While KLA demonstrates robust revenue diversification and resilience, its exposure to China introduces a level of risk due to ongoing geopolitical tensions and potential export restrictions.

title: KLA: Benefiting From China Stockpiling Semiconductor Equipment Amid Intensifying Sanctions
text: Chinese semiconductor companies are stockpiling foreign-made equipment in anticipation of further U.S. sanctions. title: KLA Declares Regular Cash Dividend
text: MILPITAS, Calif. , Nov. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) Board of Directors today declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.45 per share on its common stock, payable on Dec. 1, 2023, to KLA shareholders of record as of the close of business on Nov. 15, 2023.
